hero.title: Book Your Buggy Bike
hero.subtitle: Choose the date, time, buggy type, and number of passengers. Pay by Visa or bank transfer.
hero.stats: Fast booking for guests and families

booking.quickSubtitle: Choose date, time, route, and passengers. Each bike fits up to 2 people — groups book multiple bikes for the same slot.
booking.pickDateTime: Pick a date and time to see available bikes.
booking.pricingNote: Individual (1 per bike): 25 OMR · Group (2 sharing a bike): 15 OMR each (30 OMR total). Price updates automatically.
booking.notEnoughBikes: Need {{needed}} bike(s) but only {{available}} available for this time
booking.modeGroupHelp: Up to 2 people per bike — fewer bikes, lower price when sharing.
booking.modeIndividualHelp: One bike per person — everyone rides separately.
booking.groupTypeHelp: Tell us who is in your group so we can prepare the best experience.
booking.groupTypeRequired: Please select one group type before continuing.
booking.unavailable: Please choose a date, time, route, and enough available bikes for your group
booking.taxNote: A {{percent}}% tax is added to the ride subtotal.
booking.noticeOptional: Optional — any special requests or notes
booking.transferModalIntro: Transfer the booking total to our bank account or mobile number below. After you have paid, confirm your booking to receive your QR code and confirmation email.
booking.transferNotConfigured: Transfer details are not configured yet. Please contact us to complete payment.
booking.viewTransferDetails: View bank account & mobile transfer details
booking.paymentProcessingHint: Complete your card payment in the AMWAL window. Do not close this page.
booking.paymentFailed: Payment could not be completed. Please try again.
booking.paymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled. Complete payment to confirm your booking.
booking.paymentRetryHint: Booking {{number}} is on hold. Use the button below to retry payment.
booking.paymentUnavailable: Online payment is temporarily unavailable. Your booking was saved — please contact us to pay.
booking.paymentPendingOnlineHint: Your booking is saved. Complete payment to confirm your ride.
booking.paymentConfirmedSubtitle: Your booking is confirmed. Keep your booking number and QR code ready for arrival.
booking.transferConfirmedTitle: Transfer received — your booking is confirmed!
booking.transferConfirmedSubtitle: We have saved your booking. Show your QR code when you arrive.
booking.transferQrHint: Your transfer is being verified. Keep this QR code ready for arrival.
booking.qrAfterPayment: Complete payment to unlock your booking QR code.
booking.keepQrVisible: Save or screenshot this QR code. Show it to our team when you arrive.
booking.paidStayHint: You can return to this page anytime using the link in your confirmation email.
booking.confirmed: Thank you. Your booking request has been received.
booking.confirmedEmail: A receipt email has been sent. Your booking is pending until our team confirms it within 24 hours.
booking.saveBookingNumber: Please save your booking number — you will need it for follow-up and when you arrive.
booking.redirecting: Returning to the homepage in 5 seconds…
booking.qrHint: Show this code when you arrive. Our team will scan it to verify your booking.
booking.passSubtitle: Keep this page ready when you arrive at the location.
booking.passArrivalHint: Please show this pass and QR code to our team when you arrive.
booking.passWelcome: Welcome! You're checked in and ready for your ride.
booking.passNotFound: Booking pass not found. Please check your QR code.
booking.passQrHint: Show this QR code to our team when you arrive.
booking.waiverIntro: Please read this declaration carefully. Your name, ID, and contact details will appear on the signed waiver attached to your booking.
booking.waiverAgree: I have read and agree to the liability waiver and release terms above. I confirm that the information I provided is correct.
booking.waiverFillDetails: Fill in your name, ID, phone, and email above to enable the agreement checkbox.
booking.waiverRequired: You must agree to the liability waiver before confirming your booking.
booking.paymentLocked: Please accept the liability waiver above before choosing a payment method.

vehicles.title: Choose Buggy Type
vehicles.subtitle: Select the buggy that fits your group.

items.title: Pick Time Slot
items.text: See how many buggies are free for each time.

items.title: Select Buggy
items.text: Choose an available buggy bike from the fleet.

items.title: Pay
items.text: Pay by Visa or bank transfer.

availability.title: Buggy Bikes Board
availability.subtitle: Real-time fleet status by time slot — like an airport departures screen.
availability.noBikes: No buggy bikes available for this time slot
availability.fleetAtTime: Fleet at {{time}} — green = available, red = booked
availability.loadError: Could not load availability. Please try again.

routes.title: Popular Routes & Experiences
routes.subtitle: See the exact path you will ride before you book your buggy bike.
routes.enlargeHint: Tap Enlarge map to see the full path
routes.enlargeHelp: Scroll to zoom · Drag to move · Click any point for details · Press Esc or Close when done
routes.clickPoints: Click any point on the map for details and photos
routes.clickPointsHint: Click map points for details · Enlarge map for full view
routes.hoverPoints: Hover the green points for details

qr.title: Scan to Book
qr.subtitle: Scan the QR code to open the booking page directly.

checkIn.title: Booking check-in
checkIn.subtitle: Verify booking details, date, and time before the ride.
checkIn.notFound: Booking not found. Please check the QR code and try again.
checkIn.staffLoginHint: Staff: sign in to admin to confirm arrival.
checkIn.scannerSubtitle: Point the camera at the customer's QR code to verify their booking.
checkIn.cameraError: Could not access the camera. Use manual entry below or check browser permissions.

staff.portalSubtitle: Sign in to scan customer booking QR codes and confirm arrival.
staff.loginFailed: Could not sign in. Check username and password.
staff.scanSubtitle: Point the camera at the customer's booking QR code.
staff.useStaffPortal: Scanner accounts must sign in at /staff — not the admin panel.

items.q: Do I need previous riding experience?
items.a: No. Our team gives a safety briefing and recommends routes based on your comfort level.
Yes. Guests can book online and pay now or on arrival.
Yes. Helmets and basic safety gear are included with every ride.

lookup.title: Check Your Booking
lookup.subtitle: Enter your booking number, email, or phone number — any one is enough.
lookup.notFound: No booking found with those details.
lookup.fieldRequired: Please enter your booking number, email, or phone number.
lookup.statusSubtitle: Here are the latest details for your reservation.
lookup.checkedIn: You have already checked in for this ride.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Planning a group ride or hotel pickup? Send us your details.
contact.success: Thank you! We received your message and will reply soon.
contact.error: Unable to send your message. Please try again or email info@buggydhofar.com directly.

admin.dashboardSubtitle: Manage bookings, fleet, routes, homepage content, and payments.
admin.fleetSubtitle: Add or remove individual buggy bikes. Each bike can be booked once per time slot.
admin.deleteFleetConfirm: Delete buggy bike #{{number}}? This cannot be undone.
admin.pathsSubtitle: Add, view, edit, or delete trip paths. Toggle which paths appear on the main page.
admin.pathNeedPoints: Draw at least 2 points on the map (open Enlarge map) before saving.
admin.pathNeedDuration: Duration must be at least 1 minute.
admin.pathNeedNames: Enter the path name in English and Arabic.
admin.pathLoginRequired: Your admin session expired. Log out and sign in again, then retry.
admin.sessionExpired: Your admin session expired. Please sign in again.
admin.loginFailed: Could not sign in. Check username and password.
admin.noPaths: No paths yet. Click Add new path to create one.
admin.drawPathHelp: Click Enlarge map, add waypoints, curve the green line, and save point info before saving the path.
admin.pathCreatedNamed: "{{name}}" was created as a new path (ID #{{id}}).
admin.pathDeleteConfirm: Delete path "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
admin.deleteAllPathsConfirm: Delete every path and linked bookings? This cannot be undone. Use this to start fresh.
admin.pathsAllDeleted: All paths removed. Add new paths when you are ready.
admin.pathShownOnHome: Path is now visible on the main page.
admin.pathHiddenFromHome: Path is now hidden from the main page.
admin.transferSettingsHelp: Customers see this when they choose bank transfer. Use a bank account and/or a mobile number — no wallet fields.
admin.transferSaveFailed: Could not save transfer details. Please try again.
admin.bookingsArchiveHelp: All active bookings are stored permanently. Browse by year, month, and day. Pending bookings must be marked Paid within 24 hours or they are auto-cancelled and the buggy is released.
admin.noBookingsInRange: No bookings for this date range.
admin.searchBookingsPlaceholder: Booking number, name, email, or phone…
admin.bookingQrSubtitle: Print or share this QR code so customers can scan it and go directly to the online booking page.
admin.bookingQrScanHint: Scan to open the booking page
admin.verifyBookingSubtitle: Review the details below, then confirm the customer is present and ready for the ride.
admin.noWaiver: No waiver on file for this booking.
admin.emailMessagePlaceholder: Write your message to the visitor…
admin.replyFromNote: Email will be sent from info@buggydhofar.com

footer: Simple buggy bike booking for guests in Salalah.

home.loadError: Some data could not be loaded. Make sure the backend is running on port 8000.
